case_title: ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC VS. MARY E. ROGERS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED MAR-06-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, MARY E.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO 10/24/14 AT 9:30 A.M. COURT INSTRUCTS DEFENDANT MS. ROGERS TO SUBMIT TO DEPT. 302 THE MATERIALS CITED IN THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING POSTED ON 10/10/14 WITH A COVER LETTER NOTING THE CASE NUMBER, A NEW DATE AND TIME OF THE HEARING. COURT REQUESTS, IF POSSIBLE, THAT A COPY OF THE MATERIALS BE SUBMITTED TO DEPT. 302 BY 10/23/14. THE ORIGINAL MAY BE BROUGHT TO THE HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED.(302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARY E. RODGERS' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE DEBTOR IS ENTITLED TO AN EXEMPTION FOR FUNDS IN THE WELLS FARGO BANK ACCOUNT IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,686.05 PURSUANT TO CCP 704.080 AND 704.115. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 (302)
ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Asset Capital Recovery Group, Llc'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. PHILIP T. KILDUFF, TEL. NO. 673-0368 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
MARY RODGERS, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARY E. RODGERS' Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is granted in part. The Debtor is entitled to an exemption for funds in the Wells Fargo bank account in the amount of $3,686.05 pursuant to CCP 704.080 and 704.115. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney Brandon Tang present specially appearing for Plaintiff Asset Capital Recovery Group, LLC.
Defendant Mary E. Rogers present in pro per.

Court informs parties that Dept. 302 does not HAVE a court reporter today. Court grants Defendant's request for continuance of today's hearing to a date in which a court reporter will be present in Dept. 302. PLAINTIFF ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is continued to 10/24/14 at 9:30 a.m. Court instructs Defendant Ms. Rogers to submit to Dept. 302 the materials cited in the court's tentative ruling posted on 10/10/14 with a cover letter noting the case number, a new date and time of the hearing. Court requests, if possible, that a copy of the materials be submitted to Dept. 302 by 10/23/14. The original may be brought to the hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: S. Kane; Not reported.
